name: Apple Chip Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat together sugar, oil, and eggs.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, vanilla, apples, dates, walnuts, and raisins. Set aside a small portion of the dry mixture to coat the fruit and nuts.
3. Add the sifted ingredients to the wet mixture and blend well.
4. Stir in the remaining vanilla extract.
5. Dredge the reserved flour mixture with the chopped fruit and nuts.
6. Pour the batter into a 13x9 inch pan or two smaller pans.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes, or until set.
Note: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
